display_text: Greedy, Cost: 0: Tier 4 enhancement for neutral items that increases GPM but reduces attack damage and adds mana. Provides +75/100 bonus GPM and +200/250 bonus mana, but reduces attack damage by 30/60. Provides economic scaling at the cost of combat effectiveness. Stats: GPM Bonus: +75/+100, Mana: +200/+250, Attack Damage: -30/-60.
